name: Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter over low heat. Remove from the stove and let cool.
2. Add the chocolate to the melted butter and stir until the chocolate has melted.
3. Beat the egg yolks with 1/2 cup of sugar until pale and thick.
4. Stir in the melted chocolate, almonds, and flour into the yolk mixture.
5. Beat the egg whites and cream of tartar until they form soft peaks.
6. Gradually add the remaining sugar to the egg white mixture and beat until it has a meringue consistency.
7. Gently fold 1/4 of the egg whites into the chocolate mixture.
8. Carefully fold in the remaining egg whites.
9. Grease and flour a 22cm square tin lined with greaseproof paper.
10. Spoon the batter into the prepared tin.
11. Bake in a preheated oven at 190°C for 40 to 45 minutes, or until the cake is cooked through.
12. Allow the cake to cool in the tin.
13. Turn out onto a rack and dust with icing sugar.
14. Cut into squares and serve with ginger ice-cream or thickened cream.
(Note: Joan Campbell)
